title: grewia radula
intro: Grewia radula, also known as the West African mulberry or velvet leaf, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae. The leaves and bark of Grewia radula have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Grewia radula include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Grewia radula can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
